articles.author: Avery Lotz
articles.title: Americans aren't sold on Iran attacks, new polls show - Axios
articles.description: Polls suggest the White House's reasoning isn't resonating with Americans.
articles.content:
• If early polling is any indication, the White House's reasoning isn't resonating with Americans.
Case in point: Nearly six in ten Americans disapproved of the decision to take milita… [+2646 chars]
